title: Document optimization workflow runner + assessment bundle interpretation (public docs + operator runbook)
description:
## Summary
Document the optimization workflow runner and candidate assessment bundle so operators and future agents can execute and interpret the process consistently.

## Deliverables
- Public docs for staged workflow (deterministic check, random n=50 loop, random n=200 hard gate).
- Operator runbook for running, monitoring, and validating bundle-backed assessments.
- Guidance for interpreting decision outputs (accept/reject/inconclusive) and malfunction-routing recommendations.
- Clear references to bundle attachment contract and compact summary fields.
